title: Missing URL after HTTP request in workflow
symptom: The output of the HTTP request does not include the original URL, making it difficult to trace back the content to its source.
applies_when: URL is stored in a previous node
not_this_if: URL is not stored in the workflow before the HTTP request
root_cause: The HTTP Request node in n8n does not automatically retain the original URL unless it is explicitly referenced in the workflow. If the URL is not passed along in the workflow context, it will be lost after the HTTP request is executed.
fix_steps: Ensure the URL is stored in a variable before the HTTP Request node, such as in a Set node.
Reference the stored URL in the HTTP Request node using an expression like {{$json.link}}.
After the HTTP Request node, access the original URL using the expression {{ $('Loop Over Items1').item.json.link }}.
agent_instruction: Store the URL in a variable before the HTTP Request and reference it correctly in the node.
